model:
VAE(
  (encoder): Encoder(
    (cnv1): Conv2d(7, 8, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(2, 2), padding=(1, 1))
    (batch_norm1): BatchNorm2d(8, eps=1e-05, momentum=0.1, affine=True, track_running_stats=True)
    (cnv2): Conv2d(8, 4, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(2, 2), padding=(1, 1))
    (batch_norm2): BatchNorm2d(4, eps=1e-05, momentum=0.1, affine=True, track_running_stats=True)
    (fc1): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=64, bias=True)
    (fc2): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=64, bias=True)
  )
  (decoder): Decoder(
    (fc1): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=64, bias=True)
    (cnv1): ConvTranspose2d(4, 8, kernel_size=(4, 4), stride=(2, 2), padding=(1, 1))
    (batch_norm1): BatchNorm2d(8, eps=1e-05, momentum=0.1, affine=True, track_running_stats=True)
    (cnv2): ConvTranspose2d(8, 7, kernel_size=(4, 4), stride=(2, 2), padding=(1, 1))
  )
)
